subject: [PATCH 61/61] vfs: update core format strings for u64 i_ino

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch updates the format strings in various Linux kernel files to accommodate the change from unsigned long to u64 for inode numbers (i_ino). The changes affect the pipe, dcache, fserror, and eventpoll modules, updating print statements to use %llu/%llx instead of %lu/%lx for printing inode numbers. This ensures that inode numbers are printed correctly as 64-bit values.
